common.comingSoonBody: This part of RePro is on its way. We're building it in the open, milestone by milestone.

meta.title: RePro — Honest reviews of Luxembourg businesses
meta.description: Find and compare trusted local service providers in Luxembourg. Real, verified reviews from real customers.

home.heroTitle: Find Luxembourg businesses you can trust
home.heroSubtitle: Real, verified reviews of local service providers — rated on what matters: quality, value, communication and more.
home.comingSoon: We're just getting started — search and full company profiles arrive shortly.

valueProps.verifiedText: Account checks, moderation and anti-fake measures. Trust is the product.
valueProps.multiText: Compare on quality, value, communication and punctuality — not just one star.
valueProps.transparentText: No pay-to-rank. Paying buys a badge and features, never a higher rating.

search.title: Search results
search.noResultsHint: Try removing a filter or searching a different service.

company.writeReviewNote: Sign in to write a review — accounts and reviews arrive in the next update.

reviews.helpfulCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 person found this helpful} other {# people found this helpful}}
reviews.none: No written reviews yet — be the first.

categories.title: Browse categories
categories.subtitle: Find the right service for the job.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to write reviews and manage your account.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join RePro to review Luxembourg businesses you've used.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

compose.signInPrompt: Sign in to share your experience with this business.
compose.bodyPlaceholder: Tell others about your experience with this business…
compose.posted: Thanks! Your review is now live.
compose.responsePlaceholder: Write a public response to this review…

business.title: For businesses
business.subtitle: Claim or list your business on RePro, respond to reviews and build trust with customers across Luxembourg.
business.benefitRespondText: Reply publicly to every review and show customers you listen.
business.benefitFoundText: Appear in search and category pages when people look for your service.
business.benefitFreeText: Claim and manage your profile for free. Premium badge and analytics come later.
business.newSubtitle: Submit your details — our team reviews new listings before they go live.
